title: paspalum lenticulare f. intumescens
intro: Paspalum lenticulare f. intumescens, also known as Paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Paspalum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Paspalum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Paspalum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
